modules.module_title: Basics of Print Media, Flex Design & Vector vs Raster Graphics
CorelDRAW Interface, Tools, Shortcuts & Layout Settings
Typography, Fonts (Hindi/English) & Alignment in Print Design
Color Spaces (CMYK vs RGB) & Color Matching for Flex Printing
Canva for Flex Design, Templates, Mockups & Quick Editing
Export Settings, File Formats (CDR, PDF, TIFF) & Printing Shop Handover

questions.question: Print Media me 'Flex' (flexible vinyl board) ka use kis purpose ke liye kiya jata hai?

options.A: Direct newspaper typing columns
options.B: Large outdoor advertising banners, board hoardings aur shop signboards banane ke liye

questions.explanation: Flex banners PVC plastic vinyl sheet material ke hote hain jo waterproof aur weather-resistant hote hain, isliye outdoor boards me use hote hain.

questions.question: Flex designing me 'Vector Graphic' design software (jaise CorelDRAW) kyu prefer kiya jata hai?

options.A: Vector designs coordinates math formula base par infinite scale zoom ho sakte hain bina pixel phate (no quality loss)
options.B: Vector graphics me file size hamesha 5GB hoti hai
options.C: Vector designs me primary color red lock hota hai

questions.explanation: Massive sizes ke banner boards (jaise 20x10 feet hoardings) vector software me small scale me design hotey hain aur print ke samay full sharp expand ho jate hain.

questions.question: Raster Graphic image (jaise JPEG, PNG) ka design print me kyu limitations hold karta hai?

options.A: Fixed pixel grid se bani image high scale enlarge zoom karne par blurry aur pixelated (fat jati) ho jati hai
options.B: Raster images me single color screen hota hai
options.C: Raster graphics cannot be printed on paper

questions.explanation: Raster graphics coordinates pixels finite count hold karti hain, isliye flex size expansion me blur artifacts generate karte hain.

questions.question: Print and Flex designs check templates guidelines me 'Bleed Area' (suraksha margin) kya hota hai?

options.A: Design border lines ke beyond extra extend kiya gaya colored margin area, taaki machine cutting me edge margin safe rahe
options.C: Only white margins on text boxes

questions.explanation: Bleed margin dene se printing cutting margins mismatch cases me paper corner white empty margins prevent ho jate hain.

questions.question: Flex hoarding size systems me standard units measurements selection design software layout me kya set kiye jate hain?

options.A: Feet aur Inches (eg: 8x4 feet banners)

questions.explanation: Physical billboard dimensions feet aur inches metrics specifications templates me plan kiye jate hain, which is standard client requirement.

questions.question: CorelDRAW interface toolbox me arrow shape cursor select tool ko kya bolte hain?

options.A: Pick Tool (objects selection, resize, rotation and movement tool)

questions.explanation: Pick tool CorelDRAW me objects ko select, position, scaling aur basic layout coordinate moves support check tool hai.

questions.question: CorelDRAW tools me vector shapes ke nodes aur paths curvature curve levels editing and modify karne wale cursor ko kya bolte hain?

options.A: Shape Tool (F10 shortcut key)

questions.explanation: Shape tool nodes select points adjust coordinate controls deta hai, custom design outline vector curves modification me vital hai.

questions.question: CorelDRAW interface me current selected tools ke options parameters (jaise page size, orientation, line thickness) badalne wali bar ko kya kehte hain?

options.A: Property Bar

questions.explanation: Property bar context-sensitive hoti hai jo current select tool properties parameters modification interface details show karti hai.

questions.question: CorelDRAW shortcuts guidelines keys checks me objects alignment group centering page coordinate center alignments quick key function kya hai?

options.A: P key (page center placement)

questions.explanation: Selecting objects and pressing 'P' keyboard key places objects exactly at center boundary coordinates of the design page canvas.

questions.question: CorelDRAW vector operations me 'PowerClip' function kya work perform karta hai?

options.A: Bahar se import kiye gaye raster image / graphic design vector object path frame boundaries ke inside mask fit (clip inside) karna

questions.explanation: Powerclip mask layers masking technique are helpful to clip images into circles, polygons, or specific flex frame shapes.

questions.question: CorelDRAW tools structures shapes custom intersections checks me 'Weld' command object overlays properties settings kya impact karti hai?

options.A: Multiple selected overlapping vector shapes ko merge karke single compound shape outline design create karna

questions.explanation: Weld tool selected boundary coordinates combine shapes single solid geometry blocks check rules.

questions.question: CorelDRAW outlines properties parameters line curves setups me 'Outline Pen Tool' shortcut key controls value kya hai?

options.A: F12 function key

questions.explanation: F12 key opens Outline Pen dialog box to configure vector stroke width styles, corner shapes, and line styles controls.

questions.question: Print designs typography checks me 'Font Pairing' selection criteria design balance why important?

options.A: Clean hierarchy, contrast visual styling aur read readability indices balance maintain checks (eg: Serif headers with clean Sans-serif body)

questions.explanation: Cohesive font pairing designs readability indices improve checks visual structures maintain guidelines.

questions.question: Hindi text typesetting print media flex board designs me Kruti Dev / Mangal fonts configurations keyboard script layout differences targets what is Mangal font?

options.A: Devanagari Unicode web standard font (easily copy-paste globally without characters formatting issues)

questions.explanation: Unicode standard fonts compatible database web systems data transfer checks. Legacy Kruti Dev requires conversions codes.

questions.question: Flex boards designs typography rules checks me text character outline boundary borders (Stroke) 'Behind Fill' option setups kyu select karna recommended hai?

options.A: Taaki bold outline borders core characters letters inside fill design colors ko overlapping thickness me block ya thin na karein

questions.explanation: Behind fill outline options keeps vector stroke boundaries aligned behind core text fills, maintaining character design parameters.

questions.question: Print and Flex output designs color matching parameters colors system spaces me 'RGB' and 'CMYK' color space primary choice difference kya represent karta hai?

options.A: RGB is optimized for digital screens display lights, CMYK is standardized color space for actual ink print machines (flex/press)
options.B: RGB is high contrast print standard always
options.C: CMYK is only for video editing files
options.D: Dono models visual matching is identical

questions.explanation: RGB color profiles screens lights additive models, CMYK subtractive inks models. RGB digital designs directly printed look dull due to print color bounds conversion loss.

questions.question: RGB dynamic colors file flex printing press machines me output run karne se design colors output par kya difference dikhta hai?

options.A: Printed flex colors visual brightness drop (look dull, saturated colors mismatch, blue turns purple shifts)

questions.explanation: Print inks cannot reproduce wide luminous spectrum of screen RGB lights. Designers convert layouts to CMYK workspace before print submissions to check correct colors.

questions.question: Print designs elements borders checks typography text alignment formats me 'Justified Alignment' (dono taraf saman seema margin) block kyu use hota hai text paragraphs me?

options.A: Both left and right margins are aligned straight clean layout boxes looks (like columns in newspaper)

questions.explanation: Justify block spaces words dynamically to make clean uniform margins on both sides of print boxes.

questions.question: CorelDRAW file edits layout checks text modes 'Artistic Text' and 'Paragraph Text' difference definitions specs are what?

options.A: Artistic Text is for titles/headings (stretchable scaling), Paragraph Text is for blocks body copy (flow bounding box wraps)
options.B: Artistic text only works with black color

questions.explanation: Artistic texts scales directly with drag handles, paragraph text boxes wrap words to next lines dynamically.

questions.question: Vector curves edits checks CorelDRAW 'Bezier Tool' primary usage checks pen cursor handles modify options checks kya hai?

options.A: Place nodes and coordinate curves step by step to draw custom vector shapes and outline trace details

questions.explanation: Bezier tools precise anchor paths placements curves drawing coordinates vectors standard.

questions.question: Flex printing materials standard properties checks 'Frontlit Flex' and 'Backlit Flex' differences details me backlit flex ka primary installation area kya hai?

options.A: Light boards boxes (glow sign boards where light bulbs inside box shine through flex fabric sheet from behind)
options.B: Only direct sunlight open garden boards

questions.explanation: Backlit flex features high light transmission capacity translucent material composition to illuminate visual graphics uniformly.

questions.question: Canva designing online workspace flex board design creations workflows checks standard templates adjustments does Canva support CMYK color space download?

options.A: Yes, PDF Print download options contains CMYK color profile selection check box (Canva Pro feature)
options.B: No, Canva strictly downloads RGB formats only always
options.C: Canva only works in black-white templates

questions.explanation: Canva print export optimization supports CMYK profile outputs PDF Print options to match standard printing press inks profiles.

questions.question: Printing shop handovers design package check lists checks 'Converting to Curves' (Ctrl + Q in CorelDRAW) text conversion process why critical before file transfer?

options.A: Convert text fonts to vector solid shapes paths so printing machine PC does not show 'Font Missing' errors or character blocks layout corruptions
options.B: Make image file size compress fast
options.C: Change language settings to English automatically

questions.explanation: If printing press PC lacks design fonts, converting to curves (vector shapes paths) locks character typography outlines permanently, preventing missing font errors.

questions.question: Large flex banner layout designs 10x10 feet setups file size and system crash prevent checks designs setups standard optimization techniques scale ratio calculations me standard kya use hota hai?

options.A: Design in 1:10 scale ratio (eg: design in 12x12 inches size at high 300/600 DPI resolution, and printing shop scales to feet)
options.B: Always design full 10x10 feet canvas at 1200 DPI
options.C: Only use low resolution 72 DPI raw images

questions.explanation: Scale ratios (1:10 or 1:12) design canvas light keep checks preventing high RAM memory requirements and software crashes. Vector coordinates scale up loss-free.

questions.question: Flex printing machines printing quality resolution checks standard output scale metrics DPI stands for what?

options.A: Dots Per Inch (ink drops density per linear inch)

questions.explanation: DPI metric controls print resolution sharpness. Flex print standard DPI is ~72-150 DPI due to viewing distance, fine print offsets require 300 DPI.

questions.question: Large banner banners borders attachments grommets/eyelets (challe/metal rings) details margins guidelines checks design elements checks safety limits margins kya check coordinate details set honi chahiye?

options.A: Keep important text/graphics at least 2-3 inches inside from extreme border edges (safety margin bounds)
options.B: Align text border lines touching edges

questions.explanation: Billboards borders require metal grommets (eyelets) installations folding flex borders edges. Text near boundaries can get punched.

questions.question: Print designs handover packages file formats 'TIFF' image format kyu highly utilized check options printed files me?

options.A: Lossless raster data compression format preserving maximum print color details and transparency channel grids

questions.explanation: TIFF is high resolution lossless print industry file format exchange standard parameters checks.

questions.question: Print and Flex shops handover formats 'CDR' file extension represent what?

options.A: CorelDRAW native vector source document file format

questions.explanation: CDR is native editable workspace format for CorelDRAW projects coordinates files.

questions.question: Flex board designs mockup configurations 'Flex Mockup' kyu utilize hotey hain presentation layers checks me?

options.A: Aesthetic visual preview of shop signboard display with shadow lights projections simulating real look

questions.explanation: Mockups help client to visualize design alignment and appearance before spending on physical vinyl prints.

questions.question: Print shop setups checks 'Grommets / Eyelets' (challe) metal buttons placement standard distance interval margins flex banners suspension margins borders checks standard guidelines ranges what are recommended?

options.A: Every 1.5 to 2 feet interval spacing along all edges borders to prevent flex tearing sagging winds pressure
options.C: No metal rings allowed in outdoor flex

questions.explanation: Grommet distribution balance wind drag pressure spreads, preventing flex tearing on mounting frame boards.

questions.question: Typography settings checks 'Text Kerning' adjustments why critical in capital bold headlines of shop signboards?

options.A: Ensure balanced spacing visual gap between characters pairs (eg AV, WA) to prevent reading overlapping gaps

questions.explanation: Kerning adjustments balance character spaces optical weight legibility standard check guidelines.

questions.question: Color space structures CMYK coated vs uncoated palettes definitions what is coated palette standard print paper applications?

options.A: Optimized print inks outputs for glossy coated papers (magazines, glossy sheets catalogs)

questions.explanation: Coated ink profile calculations targets non-absorbing glossy surfaces color pop consistency standard.

questions.question: Canva layout setup flex board templates 'Dimension unit changes' where pixel is converted to feet options where it is configured in interface?

options.A: File -> Settings -> Resize options menu (configure custom units inches/cm/mm)

questions.explanation: Resize option in Canva interface handles units transitions and canvas dimension scale setups.

questions.question: CorelDRAW vector curves editing shape tool options 'Add Node' / 'Delete Node' coordinates curves control settings why critical?

options.A: Adjusting complex geometries path nodes counts (fewer nodes yields cleaner smoother curves output)

questions.explanation: Path nodes cleanups prevent jagged vectors coordinates, optimizing shape rendering speed and cutting plotter accuracy.

questions.question: Flex printing machines printing quality resolution checks standard output scale metrics DPI stands for what in printing?

options.A: Dots Per Inch (ink drops density per linear inch)

questions.explanation: DPI metric controls print resolution sharpness. Flex print standard DPI is ~72-150 DPI due to viewing distance, fine print offsets require 300 DPI.

questions.question: Print designs handover packages?

options.A: Source files (AI/CDR), Vector formats (SVG/EPS), high resolution print formats (PDF) and web transparency layouts (PNG)
options.B: Only mobile screen screenshots standard jpg version directly

questions.explanation: Reverse/Black-White logo versions print setups stamp layouts dark background visuals consistency help checks.

questions.question: Color palette selection checks checks?

options.A: Color wheel equidistant three colors forming equilateral triangle coordinates pick (high vibrant contrast balances)
options.B: Adjacent side by side colors only

questions.explanation: Triadic setups high visual vibrancy dynamic color balances checks design templates standard.

questions.question: Logo design vector software tools checks?

options.A: Convert path outline strokes to solid shapes to prevent stroke weight distortions when scaling resizing logo vectors

questions.explanation: Outlining strokes vector lines scaling weight distortions (thin lines becomes thick blocks when zoomed out) prevent checks standard delivery quality codes.

questions.question: Branding logo designs layouts checks 'Brand Typography Pairing' rules details specifications guidelines me heading?

options.A: Bold display/Serif font for headings paired with highly legible simple Sans-serif font for paragraph blocks (contrast pairings)
options.B: Both header and body same style decorative script fonts
options.D: Only capital letters in both standard

questions.explanation: Font pairing typography checks readability hierarchy visual structure ensure checks, standard guidelines.

questions.question: Print and Flex shop workflows handovers PDF export setups checks does 'PDF/X' standard ensure print consistency?

options.A: Yes, PDF/X is standard file format designed to prevent font, color space and layout configuration mismatch errors at print devices
options.B: No, PDF/X deletes image data completely
options.C: PDF/X only works in grayscale mode

questions.explanation: PDF/X format packages embed fonts, target profiles (CMYK) and layout crops safely, ensuring printing machines execute exactly what is visible.

questions.question: CorelDRAW designs exports options 'Export to TIFF' checks what is the recommended color mode for printing shop handovers?

options.A: CMYK Color (32-bit)

questions.explanation: TIFF in CMYK color format ensures lossless pixel image details preservation for big format flex printing machines.

questions.question: Print shop processes checks 'Lamination' (thin plastic film layer overlay) flex boards prints me kyu apply kiya jata hai?

options.A: Protect print surface from rainwater, sun fading scratch damages and add glossy/matte finish looks

questions.explanation: Lamination plastic coating acts as weather shield, extending the durability of banners and boards.

questions.question: Flex printing machines printing quality check standard sRGB profile convert checks does 'Gamut Warning' feature in graphic tools represent?

options.A: Highlighting colors in design that cannot be reproduced accurately by print inks (out of print gamut colors)

questions.explanation: Gamut warning highlights neon colors that print CMYK inks cannot replicate, allowing designer edits prior to print failures.

questions.question: Flex banner installations checks 'Hems / Folding borders' margins why essential?

options.A: Folding edges and sealing with heat/glue to double flex thickness at borders for grommets mounting stability

questions.explanation: Hemming reinforces borders, preventing grommets from tearing out due to high winds drag.

questions.question: Flex designing typography rules checks checks does 'Convert to Curves' make text non-editable in CorelDRAW?

options.A: Yes, once text is converted to curves (vector paths), typist cannot edit text characters spelling using text tool
options.B: No, it remains normal text typing active always
options.D: Only if file saved as PDF

questions.explanation: Converting to curves is irreversible step for text properties, so designers hamesha backup CDR files edit settings keep.

questions.question: CorelDRAW vector operations 'Envelope Tool' primary utility features checks me kya represents?

options.A: Distort text or vector objects shape boundaries dynamically to fit inside custom layout shapes

questions.explanation: Envelope tool stretches and morphs vector blocks along custom bounding frames, helpful for logo text distortions.

questions.question: Print and Flex shop workflows handovers PDF export setups checks does 'PDF/X' standard?

options.A: Yes, PDF/X is standard file format designed to prevent font, color space and layout configuration mismatch errors at print devices
options.B: No, PDF/X deletes image data completely
options.C: PDF/X only works in grayscale mode

questions.explanation: PDF/X format packages embed fonts, target profiles (CMYK) and layout crops safely, ensuring printing machines execute exactly what is visible.

questions.question: CorelDRAW designs exports options 'Export to TIFF'?

options.A: CMYK Color (32-bit)

questions.explanation: TIFF in CMYK color format ensures lossless pixel image details preservation for big format flex printing machines.

questions.question: Print shop processes checks 'Lamination'?

options.A: Protect print surface from rainwater, sun fading scratch damages and add glossy/matte finish looks

questions.explanation: Lamination plastic coating acts as weather shield, extending the durability of banners and boards.

questions.question: Print & Flex Design final handovers to printing presses why CMYK file validation is key final step?

options.A: Ensures printed flex colors exactly match design layout visuals without unexpected color shifts on press devices

questions.explanation: CMYK conversion validates the output colors profile alignment, avoiding printing errors and material waste.
